title: Identify integers, rational numbers, positives, negatives, and zero
summary: Unit 2 classification skill grounded in source-backed statement and category tasks about positive integers, negative integers, zero, integers, and rational numbers.

title: Compare and order integers and rational numbers on the number line
summary: Unit 2 number-line comparison skill grounded in source-backed midpoint, interval, ordering, and signed inequality tasks.

title: Use absolute value to reason about distance and size
summary: Unit 2 absolute-value skill grounded in source-backed distance-from-origin and absolute-value interpretation tasks.

title: Add and subtract integers and rational numbers
summary: Unit 2 signed addition and subtraction skill grounded in source-backed number-line translation, contextual signed-change, and direct computation tasks.

title: Multiply, divide, and simplify expressions with integers and rational numbers
summary: Unit 2 multiplicative expression skill grounded in source-backed signed product, quotient, reciprocal, even-power, and distributive-structure tasks.
